# Incident Remediation Template

## Purpose

Guide response to broken releases, bad reports, or CI failures.

## Reference When

Use for urgent regressions or production-quality incidents.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Prioritize containment, evidence, and clear communication.

## Template

```md
# Incident: <name>

## Impact

## Detection

## Timeline

## Root Cause

## Mitigation

## Permanent Fix

## Tests Added

## Follow-Up

## User Communication
```
